a11y.buildAnimation: Construction timeline animation: a building rising from excavation to roof

signature.title: From foundation to roof
signature.sub: The timeline of a real construction site. As you scroll, the building rises in the order it was built.

stages.name: Excavation
stages.desc: Ground is broken; the foundation pit and reinforcement are prepared.

stages.name: Structural Shell
stages.desc: The foundation is poured; the reinforced-concrete frame rises floor by floor.

stages.name: Walls
stages.desc: Brick infill walls are laid; the floor plans take shape.

stages.name: Top Floor
stages.desc: The building reaches its highest point; the structural shell is complete.

signature.reducedMotionNote: Animation off: the completed structure and the construction stages are listed below.

values.name: SOLID STRUCTURE
values.desc: Sound foundations, built to engineering and quality standards.

values.name: LAYER BY LAYER
values.desc: Each stage bears on the one before; the building rises safely.

values.name: FLOW OF TIME
values.desc: Transparent site management — full control on the road to delivery.

projects.lead: Residential projects completed by MEY İnşaat to date.

story.title: From excavation to handover
story.intro: This building's real construction frames — from the first dig to completion.

story.para: Maşuk Apartmanı was designed around the needs of modern family life. Spacious interiors, daylight-filled living areas and glass-balcony details bring comfort and aesthetics together.
story.quote:
“A calm life,
in the heart of the city.”
story.salonAlt: Living room — a daylight-filled living area (representative image)
story.malzemeAlt: Façade materials — brick, glass balcony, concrete (representative composition)

chapters.name: FAÇADE
chapters.text: A modern façade strengthened by glass balconies and vertical rhythm.

chapters.name: INTERIOR
chapters.text: Interiors shaped by daylight and a restrained material language.

chapters.name: LIVING
chapters.text: Balconies wrapped in greenery — a calm breathing space in the city.

timeline.name: Structural Shell
timeline.desc: The load-bearing system and structural shell were completed.

timeline.name: Handover
timeline.desc: Finishing works and inspections were completed and the building was handed over.

samples.address: BATI MAH. MAŞUK SOK. NO:10, PENDİK/İSTANBUL

detail.samplesNote: Values shown in grey — year, floors, units and the timeline — are sample placements; they will be updated once MEY İnşaat confirms them. Interior, site-plan and axonometric visuals are representative.
